description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The exterior walls are finished in white brick, and the structure features large, black-framed windows on all sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front facade includes a tiled patio area with two circular planters, and the main entrance is centrally located with double glass doors. Inside, the layout is open and spacious, with visible rooms including a living area, kitchen, bedrooms, and bathrooms, all furnished in a contemporary style. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The roof is flat, and there is no visible porch or veranda attached to the structure.
description: A modern, single-story white brick bungalow with large black-framed windows, a flat roof, and a tiled front patio. The design is open, bright, and contemporary with a symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tiled patio, double glass entrance doors, and symmetrical large windows.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting additional large windows and the extension of the tiled patio to the side.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear windows and a clear view into the bedrooms and bathrooms.
description_view_3: Side view revealing the flat roof, side windows, and the continuation of the patio with planters.
